testcase.name: test_create_transaction_with_psp_holding_and_release_date
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_psp_enhanced_features.py:172: in test_create_transaction_with_psp_holding_and_release_date assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to create transaction: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create transaction: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","client_id"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","transaction_type"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","amount"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_record_charges_on_transaction
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_psp_enhanced_features.py:200: in test_record_charges_on_transaction assert create_resp.status_code == 200, f"Create failed: {create_resp.text}" E AssertionError: Create failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","client_id"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","transaction_type"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","amount"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
